---
title: "Mary Trebeck"
---

## Mary Trebeck

**Dates:** (1845-1926)

**Maiden name:** (Wordsworth)

### Description

sister of Elizabeth Wordsworth

### Biography

She married (1874) James Trebeck. [Battiscombe <i>Reluctant Pioneer</i>]

### Letters

- Letter from May 8th [1895]
- Letter from [11 July 1892]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
